prompt: Transform this photo into an authentic Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print style. The person is depicted with traditional Ukiyo-e facial features and proportions while maintaining a recognizable likeness. Use bold black outlines with flat areas of color — indigo, vermillion, gold, and soft green. Add traditional wave patterns, cherry blossoms, or Mount Fuji in the background. Include a vertical text cartouche with Japanese characters. Visible wood grain texture from the printing process. Washi paper texture throughout.
